case.title: ADAMS NEWARK THEATER CO. v. CITY OF NEWARK

opinion.h: ADAMS NEWARK THEATER CO. v. CITY OF NEWARK , 353 U.S. 955 (1957)
ADAMS NEWARK THEATER CO. and I. Hirst Enterprises, Inc., appellants, v. CITY OF NEWARK, a Municipal Corporation, Joseph B. Sugrue, Director of Police of the City of Newark, et al. No. 835.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Sylvan C. Balder and Isadore Gottlieb, for appellants.
Mr. Vincent J. Casale, for appellees.
The application for stay is denied.
Mr. Justice BRENNAN took no part in the consideration or decision of this application.[ Adams Newark Theater Co. v. City of Newark 353 U.S. 955 (1957) ]
